title: Alerts / Toasts
description: Toast notifications appear fixed at the top-right corner of the screen. They stack when multiple are active and auto-dismiss after 4 seconds. Text is always dynamic.

rows.text: A simple alert—with more text and buttons.

rows.title: Well done!
paragraphs: Aww yeah, you successfully read this important alert message. This example text is going to run a bit longer so that you can see how spacing within an alert works with this kind of content.
Whenever you need to, be sure to use margin utilities to keep things nice and tidy.
